india.summary: Nick Polom, better known as Nmplol, has finalized his no-fault divorce from fellow streamer Malena Tudi. According to Dexerto, most assets were divided equally, while Starforge Systems received separate treatment. The court also denied Tudi’s request for monthly spousal support. The outcome has sparked online debate about alimony, asset division, and the financial cost of public breakups.

india.title: KSI’s departure from Sidemen triggers fresh debate after group releases clarifying statement
india.summary: The Sidemen have released a statement following KSI’s departure from the group. While they said they respect his decision, they revealed that the announcement came before a mutual plan had been agreed upon. The group hoped to organize a proper farewell but said events unfolded differently. Despite the change, the remaining members confirmed they will continue creating content together.
